# JILBIT.com

## Mission
JILBIT stands for "Jesus Is Lord, Believe It."
The ministry exists to proclaim the lordship of Jesus Christ through biblical teaching, discipleship, outreach, and practical service.

## Core Pages
- / : Home and acronym feature overview.
- /about : Ministry story and "Why it matters."
- /blog : Articles, testimonies, and teaching posts.
- /outreach : Summer Jamaica Outreach campaign information.
- /donate : Donation page with one-time or recurring giving options.
